tasks.title: Implement ICU subset (@felixgeelhaar/glossa-format)
tasks.description: Own ICU MessageFormat subset; variable interpolation, plural via Intl.PluralRules, select, nesting, apostrophe escaping.

tasks.title: Implement Go API + Postgres schema (apps/api)
tasks.description: REST + SSE service backing admin UI and Lit components; hex-arch + sqlc + RLS.

tasks.title: Implement SSE live-update channel
tasks.description: GET /api/v1/projects/:slug/sse with reconnect + heartbeats.

tasks.title: Implement Glossa SDK (@felixgeelhaar/glossa-sdk)
tasks.description: Framework-agnostic fetch + cache + SSE.

tasks.title: Implement Lit web components (@felixgeelhaar/glossa-elements)
tasks.description: <glossa-provider> + text/rich/plural/select.

tasks.title: Implement CLI (@felixgeelhaar/glossa-cli)
tasks.description: glossa init/scan/pull/push, gitignore-aware.

tasks.title: Implement Admin UI (apps/admin)
tasks.description: Lit + Vite translator interface.

tasks.title: Deployment (k3s on edge-1)
tasks.description: Distroless images + GHA + Postgres StatefulSet + cert-manager + backup CronJob.

tasks.title: First consumer migration (Brotwerk)
tasks.description: Wire <glossa-provider> + 5-10 strings; verify live updates.

tasks.title: Swap brotwerk-prod to a read-only API key
tasks.description: Issue 'brotwerk web' read-scope key via admin UI; replace GLOSSA_API_KEY in brotwerk apps/web/.env + CI build args; redeploy brotwerk; revoke the legacy write key. Validates the read-only path end-to-end and closes the embedded-write-key security gap.

tasks.title: Instrument onboarding analytics events
tasks.description: Wire five named events server-side: project_created, first_key_synced, first_translation_edited, first_consumer_request, first_ai_translation. Add analytics_events table + /admin/metrics endpoint returning cohort funnel. Unlocks time-to-first-approved-translation as the North Star.

tasks.title: Define ECP + positioning doc
tasks.description: Pick one ECP between (a) EU SaaS founders self-hosting sovereign stacks, (b) German indie devs avoiding Crowdin pricing. Output docs/positioning.md with Dunford's 5 components; reflect in README hero + GHCR description.

tasks.title: Run second-user usability test
tasks.description: Watch one non-Felix human complete a 10-key German→English translation cold-start. Pre-write 5-question script; record screen+audio; transcribe to docs/usability-2026-Q2.md. Output: prioritized blocker list + go/no-go on next feature investment.

tasks.title: Project switcher polish
tasks.description: Hide switcher when projects.length===1; show project name inline next to tenant identity. When N>1, fix the first-paint timing so the trigger shows the active project name immediately.

tasks.title: Bulk approve: progress UI + undo window
tasks.description: Replace 'Approving…' with live counter (`12 / 200 approved…`). Add 5s 'Undo' toast that delays the actual PATCH calls; clicking Undo aborts. Covers the accidental select-all footgun without nag-modals.

tasks.title: AI provider: validate key inline on save
tasks.description: Optionally trigger a single Translate call before persisting the new provider row; return 422 + upstream error on failure. `?validate=true` query param toggles behaviour.

tasks.title: Accessibility sweep
tasks.description: aria-busy on bulk approve loop; aria-live='polite' on selected counter; focus management on reveal-key dismiss; visually-hidden header for the checkbox column; verify aria-selected on gl-tabs. Add axe-core to CI.

tasks.title: Microcopy + footer polish
tasks.description: Lead empty-state body with the verb; revoke confirm names the consequence concretely; bulk-approve confirm shows count; add colophon (version + github + docs).

tasks.title: CLI install snippet: package-manager tabs
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded `pnpx` with tabs for npm / pnpm / bun / yarn so users on any of the four don't bounce. Uses gl-tabs primitive for keyboard nav.

tasks.title: SSR/hydration uncertainty UX in glossa-elements
tasks.description: Differentiate fallback slot content from live-resolved content visually until the provider's first bundle resolves: italic / dotted underline / aria-busy + opacity 0.9. Triggered off provider's context version.

tasks.title: Editor keyboard shortcuts (j/k/a/r)
tasks.description: j/k navigate keys; Enter opens edit; Esc closes; a approves current; r marks needs_review; / focuses search; ? shows help dialog. Per-user preference toggle.

tasks.title: Audit log: filter UI
tasks.description: Chips for actor_kind, date-range picker (1d/7d/30d/custom), substring search on before_value/after_value. Extend ListAuditForTenant with optional filter params.

tasks.title: Diff view → Now/Next/Later columns
tasks.description: Replace flat diff table with per-locale kanban: Now=pending+ai_translated, Next=needs_review, Later=approved. Click column header to filter editor by status.

tasks.title: Three moments of delight
tasks.description: First-approval celebration toast; AI fan-out row pulse; copy-key haptic. All behind a 'micro-interactions on/off' setting.

tasks.title: Translator invite + first-login flow
tasks.description: invites table; POST /admin/invites mints single-use 48h token; POST /auth/accept-invite consumes; link sharing is manual (no SMTP). Translator lands in /editor scoped to assigned locales.
